# stringcase

Convert string cases between camel case, pascal case, snake case etc...

{{ build_status_badge }} {{ coverage_badge }} {{ pypi_version_badge }}

## Usage

```python
import stringcase
stringcase.camelcase('foo_bar_baz') # => "fooBarBaz"
stringcase.camelcase('FooBarBaz') # => "fooBarBaz"
stringcase.capitalcase('foo_bar_baz') # => "Foo_bar_baz"
stringcase.capitalcase('FooBarBaz') # => "FooBarBaz"
stringcase.constcase('foo_bar_baz') # => "FOO_BAR_BAZ"
stringcase.constcase('FooBarBaz') # => "_FOO_BAR_BAZ"
stringcase.lowercase('foo_bar_baz') # => "foo_bar_baz"
stringcase.lowercase('FooBarBaz') # => "foobarbaz"
stringcase.pascalcase('foo_bar_baz') # => "FooBarBaz"
stringcase.pascalcase('FooBarBaz') # => "FooBarBaz"
stringcase.pathcase('foo_bar_baz') # => "foo/bar/baz"
stringcase.pathcase('FooBarBaz') # => "/foo/bar/baz"
stringcase.sentencecase('foo_bar_baz') # => "Foo bar baz"
stringcase.sentencecase('FooBarBaz') # => "Foo bar baz"
stringcase.snakecase('foo_bar_baz') # => "foo_bar_baz"
stringcase.snakecase('FooBarBaz') # => "_foo_bar_baz"
stringcase.spinalcase('foo_bar_baz') # => "foo-bar-baz"
stringcase.spinalcase('FooBarBaz') # => "-foo-bar-baz"
stringcase.titlecase('foo_bar_baz') # => "Foo Bar Baz"
stringcase.titlecase('FooBarBaz') # => " Foo Bar Baz"
stringcase.trimcase('foo_bar_baz') # => "foo_bar_baz"
stringcase.trimcase('FooBarBaz') # => "FooBarBaz"
stringcase.uppercase('foo_bar_baz') # => "FOO_BAR_BAZ"
stringcase.uppercase('FooBarBaz') # => "FOOBARBAZ"
stringcase.alphanumcase('_Foo., Bar') # =>'FooBar'
stringcase.alphanumcase('Foo_123 Bar!') # =>'Foo123Bar'
```

## Install

```
$ pip install stringcase
```

functions.name: stringcase.camelcase
documentation:
Convert string into camel case.

Args:
    string: String to convert.

Returns:
    string: Camel case string.

functions.name: stringcase.capitalcase
documentation:
Convert string into capital case.
First letters will be uppercase.

Args:
    string: String to convert.

Returns:
    string: Capital case string.

functions.name: stringcase.constcase
documentation:
Convert string into upper snake case.
Join punctuation with underscore and convert letters into uppercase.

Args:
    string: String to convert.

Returns:
    string: Const cased string.

functions.name: stringcase.lowercase
documentation:
Convert string into lower case.

Args:
    string: String to convert.

Returns:
    string: Lowercase case string.

functions.name: stringcase.pascalcase
documentation:
Convert string into pascal case.

Args:
    string: String to convert.

Returns:
    string: Pascal case string.

functions.name: stringcase.pathcase
documentation:
Convert string into path case.
Join punctuation with slash.

Args:
    string: String to convert.

Returns:
    string: Path cased string.

functions.name: stringcase.backslashcase
documentation:
Convert string into spinal case.
Join punctuation with backslash.

Args:
    string: String to convert.

Returns:
    string: Spinal cased string.

functions.name: stringcase.sentencecase
documentation:
Convert string into sentence case.
First letter capped and each punctuations are joined with space.

Args:
    string: String to convert.

Returns:
    string: Sentence cased string.

functions.name: stringcase.snakecase
documentation:
Convert string into snake case.
Join punctuation with underscore

Args:
    string: String to convert.

Returns:
    string: Snake cased string.

functions.name: stringcase.spinalcase
documentation:
Convert string into spinal case.
Join punctuation with hyphen.

Args:
    string: String to convert.

Returns:
    string: Spinal cased string.

functions.name: stringcase.dotcase
documentation:
Convert string into dot case.
Join punctuation with dot.

Args:
    string: String to convert.

Returns:
    string: Dot cased string.

functions.name: stringcase.titlecase
documentation:
Convert string into sentence case.
First letter capped while each punctuations is capitalsed
and joined with space.

Args:
    string: String to convert.

Returns:
    string: Title cased string.

functions.name: stringcase.trimcase
documentation:
Convert string into trimmed string.

Args:
    string: String to convert.

Returns:
    string: Trimmed case string

functions.name: stringcase.uppercase
documentation:
Convert string into upper case.

Args:
    string: String to convert.

Returns:
    string: Uppercase case string.

functions.name: stringcase.alphanumcase
documentation:
Cuts all non-alphanumeric symbols,
i.e. cuts all expect except 0-9, a-z and A-Z.

Args:
    string: String to convert.

Returns:
    string: String with cutted non-alphanumeric symbols.
